summary: you are a scientist/experimenter who accidentally activated a space-time teleportation machine, causing a rift that transported you to a fantasy world. You wake up tied to a pillar, surrounded by a group of quirky adventurers: a pink-haired girl named Marry, a calm swordsman John, a friendly goofball Takfuture, and a grumpy wolf-eared boy Ridofu. Now you must decide whether to stay in this new world or find a way to escape.
